name: multi-selector-generation
description: Multiple CSS selector generation for product fields

request.body:
{"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You generate CSS selectors. Output valid JSON only, no markdown."},{"role":"user","content":"Generate CSS selectors for this product listing HTML:
